name: title-slide
description: Dark hero style. Use for any slide that needs a bold, centered focal point — title screens, section dividers, or closing CTAs. Tone: dramatic, confident.

guide.palette: Dark background (#0B1D3A), white heading, muted blue subtitle (#7EB8DA), accent button (#4472C4). Swap these colors freely to match your brand.
guide.layout: Vertically centered stack: large heading → subtitle → optional CTA button. All elements centered on the slide.
components: Optional CTA roundRect button at bottom
guide.animations: fadeIn for text, flyIn from bottom for CTA. Use afterPrevious with short delays for staggered reveal.
guide.customization: Add background gradient, decorative ellipses, or a logo image. Duplicate this slide as a section divider between content sections.

elements.text: A brief subtitle or tagline goes here
